## Contact the Founder
If you are submitting a major feature, UI change, or architectural shift, please make sure you have discussed it with the founder first to ensure it aligns with the vision!
**Telegram:** [@shahileeee](https://t.me/shahileeee)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the clean, "Vantablack" minimalist style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have read the DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md
- [ ] No new errors or warnings are introduced in the console
- [ ] If changing Native Modules, I have tested on both iOS and Android (or specified which one)
